codeReview.summary: Focused reviewer-entry changes match the feature contract: inbox role/node filtering remains explicit in `useUserStore`, legacy `reviewerId` normalization still maps into checker semantics, and task selection now routes through a shared helper that hydrates `useReviewStore` before opening the review panel.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked `followedProcedure` true even though the skill requires manual validation of a reviewer task selection path, but the transcript and handoff only closed a reserved browser session and recorded no live reviewer smoke flow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/dongpengcheng/.factory/missions/4d7bd249-b8ec-4d5d-9033-77ef2ded8396/handoffs/2026-03-13T14-51-04-948Z__m2-reviewer-inbox-and-task-hydration__41dae33f-60da-4cb3-a29b-b0713f26a591.json` shows `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` while `verification.interactiveChecks[0].observed` says no live browser-based reviewer smoke flow was started; `review-entry-worker` step 9 requires selecting a task and validating the reviewer-facing path on `3101`.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit `4cb5ad4`, and the touched reviewer-entry files. I found no blocking code or contract issues in the scoped inbox filtering and hydration changes; the only gap is shared-state/skill accuracy around manual verification being reported as completed when it was skipped.
